---
format: gfm-commonmark
default-image-extension: ""
execute:
  eval: false
---

### Citation

{{< cite-as >}}

### Badges

[![Computo build](https://github.com/{{< meta github-user >}}/{{< meta repo >}}/actions/workflows/build.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/{{< meta github-user >}}/{{< meta repo >}}/actions/workflows/build.yml)
[![Validation](https://github.com/{{< meta github-user >}}/{{< meta repo >}}/actions/workflows/validation.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/{{< meta github-user >}}/{{< meta repo >}}/actions/workflows/validation.yml)
[![Reviews](https://img.shields.io/badge/review-report-blue)](https://github.com/{{< meta github-user >}}/{{< meta repo >}}/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3Areview)
[![Creative Commons License](https://i.creativecommons.org/l/by/4.0/80x15.png)](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)

### Author affiliation

{{< author-list >}}

### Abstract

{{< meta abstract >}}

### Build the Computo article

```bash
python -m venv .venv
source .venv/bin/activate
python -m pip install --upgrade pip
python -m pip install -e ".[test]"
quarto add computorg/computo-quarto-extension@v1.0.4 --no-prompt
quarto render
```

The official `computo-html` and `computo-pdf` outputs are written to `_site/`.

### Reproduce figures and tables

```bash
python scripts/make_manuscript_assets.py
```

The command reads committed raw and summary CSV files and regenerates every displayed figure in PDF, SVG, and 300-dpi PNG, together with all Markdown and CSV tables.

### Validate code and cached results

```bash
pytest
python scripts/validate_research_artifact.py
python scripts/validate_manuscript.py
```

A reduced end-to-end run is available through

```bash
python -m discoverzo.cli --config configs/quick.yaml --output results/quick
```

The complete verified experiment is rerun with `python scripts/run_verified.py`; it is intentionally separated from document rendering. See `REPRODUCIBILITY.md`, `docs/experiment_protocol.md`, and `docs/VALIDATION.md` for the data schema, random-seed ledger, exact query accounting, and validation record.

### Metadata to complete before submission

Replace `replace-with-github-user` in `_quarto.yml` and `main.qmd`, and add the corresponding-author email in both metadata blocks. No DOI or publication URL should be inserted before assignment by the journal.
